error_signature: The "SUBDOMAIN" variable is not set. Defaulting to a blank string.
title: SUBDOMAIN variable not set in n8n deployment
symptom: When deploying n8n without a subdomain, warnings about the SUBDOMAIN variable not being set appear, and the editor is accessible via an incorrect URL.
not_this_if: Not using Traefik for reverse proxy
root_cause: The n8n deployment configuration expects a SUBDOMAIN variable to be set for proper routing. When this variable is not defined, it defaults to a blank string, leading to incorrect URL formation and warnings in the logs.
fix_steps: Open the Docker Compose file for your n8n deployment.
Ensure that the SUBDOMAIN variable is removed from the environment variables section.
Set the DOMAIN_NAME variable to your desired domain without a subdomain.
Restart the Docker containers to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Remove the SUBDOMAIN variable from your n8n Docker configuration and set the DOMAIN_NAME correctly.
